decision: Use web_search(query, *, max_results, domains, city, state) -> list[dict]
reason: Keeps the adapter surface narrow and backend-agnostic

decision: Return title, url, snippet, source_domain, published_date, retrieval_status
reason: Preserves enough discovery metadata for provenance and retention without over-specifying the backend

decision: Expose per-city domain filters and use them as hard preferences
reason: Pushes discovery toward official municipal, school, union, and state sources

decision: Cap results per query, retained sources per city, and extractions per source
reason: Improves token efficiency and keeps city-by-city review bounded

decision: Treat extraction as part of the custom callback boundary
reason: Lets one hook own discovery, retention, and structured output shape

decision: Serialize Response as parseable JSON in all modes

reason: Matches the hook shape and avoids unnecessary transport complexity

decision: Do not retry backend failures automatically
Preserve URLs and snippets directly in payloads
reason: Maintains provenance and supports manual verification

decision: Keep causal, mechanism-proxy, discourse, and lead-only outputs separate
reason: Prevents accidental ingestion logic and protects corpus discipline
